F-16014/18/98 Tt (Fd) ] RS, dw, wgw Afa Frurr @ sy MRA S T, SRNR, SF 01, @E 3() F mawft 778() Tw 31 R, 1998 g HRE Feumg g . ’ MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS ORDER New Delhi, the 17th November, 2006 G.5.R, 7T14(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of Section 3 of the Envircnment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the 2-T Oil (Regulation of Supply and Distribution) Order, 1998, namely :— 3650 GI/2006 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [Part I—Sgc. 3(0)]2 1. (1) This Order may be called the 2-T Oil (Regulation of Supply and Distribution) Amendment Order, 2006. (2) Itshall come into force from the 1st day of January, 2007. .2. Inthe2-T Oil (Regulation of Supply and Distribution) Order, 1998, in sub-paragraph (2), of paragraph 1, after the words “National Capital Territory of Delhi*, the words “and to the cities of Ahmedabad, Kanpur, Sholapur, Lucknow, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Kolkata, Agra, Jharia, Varansi, Faridabad, Patna, Jodhpur and Pune” shall be inserted. ) [F. No. Q-16014/18/98-CPA (P.)] R. K. VAISH, Jt. Secy. Note :—-The Principal Order was publishéd in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3(i) vide G.S.R. 778(E) dated 31st December, 1998.
